## snapr: Convenient Snapshot Testing Functions for R Packages {.unnumbered}


### Description

Provides convenient snapshot testing functions for R packages, including expect_snapshot_data() for data.frames and expect_snapshot_object() for any R object.



### Author(s)

<strong>Maintainer</strong>: Douglas Ezra Morrison <a href="mailto:demorrison@ucdavis.edu">demorrison@ucdavis.edu</a>



### See Also

Useful links:


<ul>
<li> <a href="https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr">https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr</a>

</li>
<li> <a href="https://d-morrison.github.io/snapr/">https://d-morrison.github.io/snapr/</a>

</li>
<li> Report bugs at <a href="https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr/issues">https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr/issues</a>

</li></ul>
